# Hot Sonia — Full LLM Context File
# Escorts in Patna | Call Girls in Patna | Patna Escorts Service
# https://hotsonia.in | Contact: +91 9229604907

## About This Site

Hot Sonia (hotsonia.in) is Patna's #1 premium escort and call girl service, operating since 2015. We provide verified, beautiful female companions for in-call, out-call, and overnight bookings across Patna and surrounding areas in Bihar, India. 100% discreet, safe, and confidential. Available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week including holidays.

## Business Details

- **Business Name:** Hot Sonia
- **Website:** https://hotsonia.in
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +91 9229604907
- **Email:** contact@hotsonia.in
- **Address:** Patna, Bihar 800001, India
- **Founded:** 2015
- **Rating:** 4.9 / 5.0 (312 verified reviews)
- **Operating Hours:** 24/7 — Monday to Sunday, 00:00 to 23:59

## Services Offered

### 1. In-Call Escort Service — from ₹3,000
Private, luxurious in-call venues across Patna. Clean, discreet rooms available 24/7. Client visits our location.

### 2. Out-Call Escort Service — from ₹4,000
Our call girls come to your hotel room, home, or any location in Patna. Fully discreet, on time.

### 3. Overnight Escort Package — from ₹12,000
A full night of warm companionship with one of our premium Patna Escorts. Extended time, maximum comfort.

### 4. Travel Companion — from ₹20,000/day
Take a beautiful escort from Patna on any trip — business or leisure, domestic or international.

### 5. GFE (Girlfriend Experience)
A realistic, intimate companionship experience — cuddling, dining, conversation, and more.

### 6. Hotel Escort Service
We serve all major hotels in Patna — from budget hotels near Patna Junction to 5-star properties on Fraser Road, Bailey Road, and Gandhi Maidan. 100% discreet, no attention drawn at your property.

### 7. Doorstep Delivery
Same-city doorstep delivery of your chosen companion — at home or office.

## FAQs

**Q: What is the best escort service in Patna?**
A: Hot Sonia is ranked #1 among escorts in Patna with 500+ verified clients, 12+ beautiful companions, and 10+ years of experience.

**Q: How do I book call girls in Patna?**
A: Call or WhatsApp +91 9229604907. Choose from our gallery, mention your preferred time and service, and we confirm within minutes.

**Q: Are escorts in Patna available 24 hours?**
A: Yes. Hot Sonia's escorts are available 24/7 including weekends and holidays.

**Q: What are the rates for Patna Escorts Service?**
A: In-call from ₹3,000 | Out-call from ₹4,000 | Overnight from ₹12,000 | Travel companion from ₹20,000/day.

**Q: Are call girls in Patna safe and discreet?**
A: Yes. 100% confidentiality. Client information is never shared or stored after the session.

**Q: Do you offer same-day booking?**
A: Yes. Same-day and same-hour bookings available. WhatsApp or call, confirm your choice, companion ready within the hour.

**Q: What areas do you cover?**
A: All major areas of Patna — Boring Road, Bailey Road, Fraser Road, Kankarbagh, Gandhi Maidan, Patna Junction, and 50+ more locations.
